title: Tra-Vel private consented lead contact
description: The closed, bounded, explicitly consented callback-contact record stored with an assisted quote case or commercial intent. It exists only because the traveler sent consent=true with the exact current contact-consent version; anything else is rejected with 400 before storage. It is operator-readable only: traveler-visible responses expose at most a contact_provided boolean, and events, logs, and webhook payloads never carry the name or phone. The record is deleted with its parent aggregate by the existing retention cleanup.
